{{Quote|Only Sath matters on Samaria.|[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]|<ref name="The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]''</ref>}}
'''Sath''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] on the desert [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]. The seat of government was the [[Hall of Ministers]].

==Characteristics==
[[Samarian]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] had constructed a large bay of [[Water/Legends|water]] with channels running through the [[City/Legends|city]], that curved around two-thirds of the city. Additionally, many stretches of sand were developed into [[Flower/Legends|flower]]-like designs on the bay. Government buildings, as well as homes for the wealthy, and the palace of the [[Prime Minister/Legends|prime minister]], were located here. The royal court of Samaria was constructed on a cluster of ten of the sandy fingers. One of the buildings, the [[Hall of Ministers]], was tiled with [[Color/Legends|blue]] stones to mirror the artificial bay.

==History==
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Ferus Olin]] was sent to Sath to root out a bug in the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]-wide [[Computer/Legends|computer]] system.

{{City-stub}}
